creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
I should mention that the libpst fork is now at 0.6.21, but recent changes
have broken the build on systems that use iconv() from GNU libiconv, and I
am waiting for the upstream maintainers to fix the problem before sending in
an updated port.  But I think the previous patch that updates to 0.6.17 is
still an improvement on the older version now in Ports. 

Regards,
            b.
